description:
GlazeWM is a tiling window manager for Windows inspired by i3wm.

GlazeWM lets you easily organize windows and adjust their layout on the fly by using keyboard-driven commands.
> Getting started on macOS? Install via Homebrew:
>
> # For glazewm + zebar (the top bar):
> brew install --cask glzr-io/tap/glazewm glzr-io/tap/zebar
🐛 Bug fixes
- Fixed regression for lwin/rwin/win keybindings not working. (#1318 by @freddiehaddad)
- Fixed parse error when using keybindings with ` and ' (#1324)
- Fixed Display device not found error during sleep/wake on Windows. (#1311 by @durdn)
- Fixed "Run on system startup" tray option not working. (#1333)
- Fixed "Show config folder" tray option not opening the correct path. (#1332)
- Fixed windows on macOS being unmanaged after sleep/wake. (#1329, #1331)
- Fixed cleanup on IPC send failure. (#1309 by @durdn)
- Updated dependencies for macOS 26 compatibility. (#1320 by @lohrm-spf)
Big thanks to @durdn, @freddiehaddad, @lohrm-spf for contributing to this release 💛
/ @lars-berger
